---
title: "CSTA K-12 CS Standards"
subtitle: "Computer Science Teachers Association K-12 Standards (Revised 2017)"
jurisdiction: "US"
framework-type: "Pedagogy"
organizing-units: 25
elements: 254
license: "CC BY-NC-SA 4.0"
date: 2026-05-08
categories: [pedagogy, us]
---

## At a glance

| | |
|---|---|
| Steward | Computer Science Teachers Association |
| Canonical page | [CSTA K-12 CS Standards](https://csteachers.org/k12standards/) |
| Version | Revised 2017 |
| Released | 2017 |
| Source format | XLSX |
| License | Creative Commons BY-NC-SA 4.0 |
| `framework_summary` slug | `csta-2017` |

## Structure in cybed: terms

::: {.column-page}

```{=html}
<figure class="schema-diagram">
<button type="button" class="toggle-all" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Toggle schema names for all elements"><span class="toggle-icon" aria-hidden="true">▸</span><span class="toggle-text">schema names</span></button>
<svg viewBox="0 0 620 320" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-labelledby="csta-structure-title">
  <title id="csta-structure-title">CSTA K-12 CS structural mapping</title>
  <defs><marker id="csta-arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8.5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55"/></marker></defs>
  <g stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" fill="none" opacity="0.55">
    <line x1="310" y1="58" x2="310" y2="100" marker-end="url(#csta-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="220" y1="170" x2="160" y2="220" marker-end="url(#csta-arrow)"/>
    <line x1="400" y1="170" x2="460" y2="220" marker-end="url(#csta-arrow)" stroke-dasharray="5,4"/>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Framework">
    <rect x="230" y="20" width="160" height="40" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="310" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Framework</text>
    <text class="lt" x="310" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">csta:Framework</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Standard group">
    <rect x="150" y="100" width="320" height="70" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.16)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="310" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Standard group</text>
    <text class="lp" x="310" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.65">(level × concept cell)</text>
    <text class="lt" x="310" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">csta:StandardGroup</text>
    <text class="lt" x="310" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:OrganizingUnit</text>
    <text class="lt" x="310" y="161" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.55">(no cybed:Role)</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Standard">
    <rect x="80" y="220" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6"/>
    <text class="lp" x="160" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Standard</text>
    <text class="lt" x="160" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">csta:Standard</text>
    <text class="lt" x="160" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">= cybed:RoleElement</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-node" aria-label="Example">
    <rect x="380" y="220" width="160" height="60" rx="6" fill="rgba(14,165,233,0.10)" stroke="#0284C7" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
    <text class="lp" x="460" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">Example</text>
    <text class="lp" x="460" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">clarification text</text>
    <text class="lt" x="460" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="currentColor">cybed:Example</text>
    <text class="lt" x="460" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="10.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">clarification text</text>
  </g>

  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Framework-to-standard-group connection">
    <text class="ep" x="318" y="84" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">contains</text>
    <text class="et" x="318" y="84" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasOrganizingUnit</text>
  </g>
  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Standard-group-to-standard connection">
    <text class="ep" x="195" y="200" text-anchor="end" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">has element</text>
    <text class="et" x="195" y="200" text-anchor="end" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasElement</text>
  </g>
  <g class="cyb-edge-label" aria-label="Standard-group-to-example connection">
    <text class="ep" x="425" y="200" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="11.5" font-style="italic" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">has example</text>
    <text class="et" x="425" y="200" font-family="JetBrains Mono,monospace" font-size="10" font-style="italic" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7">cybed:hasExample</text>
  </g>
</svg>
<figcaption>Numbered standards attach to each standard group. Clarification text, where present, is reached through a separate connection. Click any box or edge label to flip between plain English and the technical schema name.</figcaption>
</figure>
```

:::

## Counts

| Measure | Value |
|---|---|
| Standard groups | 25 |
| Strict elements (numbered standards) | 140 |
| With-examples elements | 254 |
| Examples (clarification text) | 114 |
| Elements per standard group (strict) | 5.6 |
| Elements per standard group (with examples) | 10.2 |

Per-unit density approximately doubles when clarification text is
included alongside numbered standards.

## Provenance

::: {.provenance-cards .column-page}

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-archive"/></svg>

**Source**

CSTA K-12 CS Standards distribution.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-gear"/></svg>

**Ingestion**

`scripts/010-ingest-csta.R` parses standards and clarification text into the cybed schema.
:::

::: {.provenance-card}
<svg class="provenance-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-license"/></svg>

**License**

Creative Commons BY-NC-SA 4.0, non-commercial use with attribution and share-alike. The package does not bundle the source distribution. Users stage it locally.
:::

:::

## Caveats

- CSTA's seven core practices sit in the framework's high-level structure but are **not represented as per-cell numbered elements**. They run alongside the level-by-concept enumeration rather than within it.
- Some clarifications are **constraining specifications and others are illustrative**. The package treats all clarifications uniformly as `cybed:Example` nodes. Analyses that need to distinguish prescriptive scaffolding from illustrative scaffolding will need to read the source text.
- CSTA's revised 2017 standards **predate the K-12 cybersecurity push** and center general computer science. Cybersecurity content appears within Networks and the Internet and within Impacts of Computing rather than as a dedicated concept area, which is one of the gaps Cyber.org K-12 was authored to fill.

## Related

- [Cyber.org K-12](cyberorg-k12.qmd), the closest peer framework.
- [Cross-framework density spread](../queries/density-spread.qmd)
- [The vocabulary](../concepts/vocabulary.qmd)
